# Embedded Google Fonts licenses

All families in the curated set (Design 0013 W3) are licensed under the SIL
Open Font License 1.1 (OFL-1.1), which permits embedding and redistribution.
Files are fetched at build time from the pinned `google/fonts` commit; see
`fonts.bzl`.

| --- | --- | --- | --- |
